# models.types { #mlsysim.models.types }

`models.types`



## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [ComputationGraph](#mlsysim.models.types.ComputationGraph) | Hardware-Agnostic representation of a Workload. |
| [Workload](models.types.Workload.qmd) | Base workload type. |
| [TransformerWorkload](models.types.TransformerWorkload.qmd) | Dense Transformer workload type. |
| [SparseTransformerWorkload](models.types.SparseTransformerWorkload.qmd) | Sparse Transformer / MoE workload type. |
| [CNNWorkload](models.types.CNNWorkload.qmd) | CNN workload type. |

### ComputationGraph { #mlsysim.models.types.ComputationGraph }

```python
models.types.ComputationGraph()
```

Hardware-Agnostic representation of a Workload.
The 'Intermediate Representation' (IR) of demand.
